data.title: FERRARI RELEASES ITS 2025 ANNUAL REPORT AND FILES ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 20-F
data.description: Ferrari N.V. disclosed on February 19, 2026, that it released its 2025 Annual Report and submitted its Form 20-F to the United States Securities and Exchange Commission for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. The annual report encompasses financial details. Additionally, the 2025 Sustainability Statement, formulated as per the European Sustainability Reporting Standard (ESRS) guidelines on a voluntary basis, has been integrated into the 2025 Annual Report. The company's stocks are listed on NYSE/EXM under the ticker symbol RACE.

data.title: Smithfield Foods Shares Rise After Strong Q4 Results
data.description: Smithfield Foods, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFD) saw a rise in its shares following the release of its fourth-quarter results, beating expectations. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 83 cents, surpassing the consensus of 68 cents. Sales totaled $4.227 billion, marking a 7.0% increase from the previous year, exceeding the expected $4.138 billion. Adjusted operating profit saw a substantial rise of 27.8% year over year, reaching $402 million, with the adjusted operating margin expanding to 9.5% from 8.0% in the same period last year. The company reported an adjusted EBITDA from continuing operations of $502 million, up from $402 million in the previous year, and the adjusted EBITDA margin from continuing operations also grew to 11.9% from 10.2%. As of Dec. 28, 2025, the company had $3.837 billion in available liquidity, including $1.539 billion in cash and equivalents. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Employers Holdings, Inc. releases Q4 2025, full-year financial results, declares $0.32/share dividend, completes $125M recapitalization.
data.description: Last week, the government announced an increase in the minimum wage to $15.25 per hour, starting next month. This decision will benefit over 2 million workers across the country. Additionally, the unemployment rate fell to 4.5% in July, the lowest it has been in over a year, with more than 300,000 new jobs created. Experts predict that these changes will have a positive impact on the economy and help boost consumer spending.

data.title: Integrated Environmental Technology (IET) Announces Restructured Engineering Division and Appoints Carter Belvin as Vice President of Engineering
data.description: IET has revealed a revamped Engineering Division and named Carter Belvin PE as its new Vice President of Engineering. Belvin will oversee all engineering operations as part of the restructuring. This move is expected to boost efficiency and drive innovation within the company. The Engineering Division will focus on key areas, with a particular emphasis on sustainability and growth. Belvin's appointment marks a significant step in IET's strategic development plan, and the company aims to leverage his expertise to enhance its engineering capabilities. This restructuring comes as part of IET's commitment to continuous improvement and adapting to industry demands. With this change, IET is poised for future success as it solidifies its position in the market.

data.title: S&P tokenizes Treasury index on Canton Network, making bond benchmark data accessible through tokens for institutions.
data.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices recently announced that its iBoxx US Treasuries Index will be available on the Canton Network. This move enables institutions to retrieve bond benchmark data using tokens instead of feeds. This initiative aims to streamline access to the index and enhance the user experience. By incorporating the iBoxx US Treasuries Index into the Canton Network, S&P Dow Jones Indices is catering to the increasing demand for efficient and secure access to financial data. This development signifies a shift towards token-based access, which is expected to revolutionize how institutions interact with benchmark data.

data.title: Trends in Housing Affordability: Who Can Currently Afford to Buy a Home?
data.description: The current housing market is seeing improved affordability as mortgage rates have dropped below 6.5%. This decrease in rates has made it possible for more individuals to consider buying a home. The shift in affordability is encouraging for potential homebuyers, as it allows for a larger number of individuals to enter the housing market.

data.title: Deal Drama Ends As Two Harbors Picks CrossCountry Over UWM
data.description: Shares of Two Harbors Investment Corp. (NYSE: TWO) are down following the announcement of a definitive merger agreement with CrossCountry Mortgage. Per the deal, TWO shareholders will receive $10.80 per share in cash for the merger. Additionally, holders of TWO's preferred stock will see their shares redeemed at $25.00 per share, plus any accrued dividends. The merger is expected to be completed in the latter half of 2026, subject to customary closing conditions and shareholder approval. Following the transaction, TWO common stock will be delisted from the NYSE and will function as a wholly owned subsidiary of CrossCountry. The merger aims to establish a comprehensive mortgage entity by merging TWO's mortgage servicing rights portfolio with CrossCountry's retail origination platform. data.title: Xunlei Limited Announces Completion of Disposition of Majority Equity Interest in Shenzhen Onething
data.description: Shenzhen, China - March 16, 2026 - Xunlei Limited, a prominent technology company offering distributed cloud services in China and listed on Nasdaq as XNET, has finalized the sale of a majority share in Shenzhen Onething Technology Co., Ltd. The Transaction, initially declared on March 3, 2026, has been completed after all necessary conditions were met. This deal marks a significant development for Xunlei and Shenzhen Onething, as they move forward following the successful closure of the transaction.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Rise; Trump Warns Iran To 'Get Serious Before It Is Too Late'
data.description: President Trump issued a warning to Iran to "get serious before it is too late" regarding a deal, causing futures to decline. Meanwhile, oil prices experienced an increase. Karman Holdings, a space company, reported earnings after hours. This led to a drop in Dow Jones futures and a rise in oil prices.

data.title: What Is "Demure and Mindful" to Real Estate? Let's Look at First-time Buyers
data.description: First-time homebuyers need to approach the real estate market with caution and mindfulness, especially when considering factors such as finances, previous living arrangements, making competitive offers, and collaborating with a real estate agent. This prudent and thoughtful approach is crucial for those entering the market for the first time to ensure a successful home purchase.

data.title: Guggenheim Investments Again Ranked Among Top Taxable Bond Fund Families by Barron's
data.description: Company achieves its fourth top-five ranking since 2020, with three years spent as the top-ranked firm.

data.title: Brookfield Business Partners Announces Closing Date of Corporate Simplification
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 16, 2026, Brookfield Business Partners L.P. (BBU) and Brookfield Business Corporation (BBUC) disclosed that they have obtained all essential clearances to finalize the anticipated corporate simplification process, merging into a singular publicly traded Canadian entity. This decision marks a significant milestone for the companies, streamlining their operations and structure. The move is expected to enhance efficiency and foster a more cohesive corporate framework.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Tumble On Cautious Hopes For Iran Peace Deal
data.description: Stock market futures experienced an increase while oil prices dropped following reports of the United States sending a peace proposal to Iran. President Trump commented on Tehran's cooperation, stating they are "making rational decisions." This development led to a rise in Dow Jones futures and a significant decrease in oil prices as optimism for a potential peace deal with Iran emerged.

data.title: Trade deficit remained near record high in 2025
data.description: The Commerce Department is anticipated to release a report soon indicating that in 2025, the United States had a trade deficit for goods that persisted at a historic level, even though there was a significant decrease in imports from China.
